name: Architect Studio
bestFor: Mapping systems, dependencies, and leverage points
Converting strategic intent into durable architecture

steps.label: DISCOVER
steps.caption: Locate structural constraints, dependencies, and leverage.

steps.label: DEFINE
steps.caption: Frame the architecture problem and decision boundaries.

steps.label: DESIGN
steps.caption: Create the system structure required for advantage.

steps.label: DECIDE
steps.caption: Select the structure that can carry movement.

steps.label: DELIVER
steps.caption: Prepare the architecture for execution handoff.

capabilities.label: QDS
capabilities.description: Future qualification of structural tradeoffs and readiness.

capabilities.label: Docente
capabilities.description: Future learning layer for capability formation and operating-model adaptation.

capabilities.label: VMG
capabilities.description: Future adaptation intelligence connection for movement from design to execution.

integrationSlots.label: QDS Tradeoff Qualification
integrationSlots.description: Tradeoff and readiness qualification will integrate here.

integrationSlots.label: VMG Movement Handoff
integrationSlots.description: Adaptive movement execution will integrate after architecture decision.

visual.alt: Bright architect studio with standing model table, white architectural models, blueprints, and daylight through floor-to-ceiling windows
